request.system: You are a regulatory analyst. Decompose a prediction-market contract's resolution criteria into 1-3 atomic conditions. Each condition should describe one independent path by which the contract can resolve YES. Return JSON matching the provided schema; labels ≤ 40 chars; summaries ≤ 200 chars.
request.user:
Title: FDA approves Retatrutide in 2026?
Resolution criteria: This market will resolve to 'Yes' if the U.S. Food and Drug Administration formally
approves Retatrutide (LY3437943, Eli Lilly's triple GIP/GLP-1/glucagon receptor
agonist) for any indication by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Approval must be
via formal FDA authorization — a New Drug Application (NDA) or Biologics License
Application (BLA) approval letter. Excludes Emergency Use Authorizations (EUA),
compassionate use designations, tentative approvals, and approvable letters.

Retatrutide targets obesity, type 2 diabetes, and related metabolic conditions.
Phase 3 clinical trial data is expected in 2026, with NDA submission expected no
earlier than late 2026, making a 2026 FDA decision unlikely but possible on
accelerated review pathways.

Settlement entities: ['Food and Drug Administration', 'Center for Drug Evaluation and Research', 'Eli Lilly and Company', 'Office of New Drugs']

conditions.label: FDA NDA approval by 2026 deadline
conditions.summary: FDA issues an NDA approval letter for Retatrutide (LY3437943) for any indication by Dec 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Accelerated approval qualifies. Excludes EUA, compassionate use, tentative or approvable letters.

conditions.label: FDA BLA approval by 2026 deadline
conditions.summary: FDA issues a BLA approval letter for Retatrutide (LY3437943) for any indication by Dec 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Accelerated approval qualifies. Excludes EUA, compassionate use, tentative or approvable letters.
